text: The 20-variant sweep winner was C11: LayerNorm -> Linear(23,256) -> ReLU -> Linear(256,128) -> ReLU -> Linear(128,2), unweighted BCE.

locator.quote: The headline number is the Brier improvement

text: C11 headline is the Brier improvement (-37.2% vs baseline) with no Pearson cost (+7.4%); the calibration win dominates the ranking lift.
